doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The document contains a materially false legal claim that a 5-day notice alone obligates a tenant to vacate without court proceedings, contradicting actual Illinois eviction law, and no such HUD fact sheet series exists in this format.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 97
REASON: This document contains a critically false and dangerous legal claim—that a 5-day pay-or-quit notice obligates a tenant to vacate without a court hearing—when in reality Illinois law (735 ILCS 5/9-209) requires a landlord to file an eviction lawsuit and obtain a court judgment before a tenant can be legally removed; additionally, no such HUD fact sheet series "TRF-2026-IL" exists, and HUD does not co-issue state-specific eviction obligation notices with state attorneys general in this format.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 97
REASON: The document contains a materially false legal claim that a 5-day notice alone obligates a tenant to vacate without court proceedings, contradicting actual Illinois eviction law, and no such HUD fact sheet series exists in this format.
